response.overview: It tells the story of a woman named Effa played by Mira Filzah who disguises herself as a religious teacher and flees from a loan shark to Kampung Ramadan. By coincidence, Effa meets Asyraf, a character played by Hun Haqeem, who is an imam appointed hastily because he loves reciting the Quran and his videos have gained widespread attention. However, the title of imam given to him makes Asyraf uncomfortable and he asks the public to stop calling him that because he only loves the Quran. . . . . . To pay off her debt, Effa is willing to disguise herself as a religious teacher and deceive people about her background. However, because she is constantly being chased by loan sharks, she desperately flees to Kampung Ramadan and meets Imam Asyraf, an influencer who went viral because of his melodious voice when reciting the Quran. Imam Asyraf has been appointed by Tok Jamlus to be the imam throughout the Tarawih prayers this Ramadan.
response.title: Imam Instant Ustazah Scammer
